items.caption_text:
I’M IN A BOOK!! ✨✨✨

Last year, just few weeks before I left Sweden, @shiragill came from San Francisco all the way to Stockholm to include me and my home in her latest project - a book about 25 organizers from all around the globe! (The beautiful pictures in the book are by @vivianjohnsonphoto ).
The book will be released on October 3rd but you can pre-book it today!
Feeling honored and so excited to be included in this book and couldn’t ask for a better farewell gift of the place that was my home and the reason this Instagram account came to life!! 

@tenspeedpress 
.
.
.
.
___________________ 

#organizedlivingbook 
#homeorganizer #getorganized 
#declutteringmylife #seekingsimplicity #becomingminimalist #organizedhome #professionalorganizer #declutterchallenge #softminimalism #organizedlife  #tidyhousetidymind #clutterfree #professionalorganizer #sparkjoy #mykonmari #choosejoy #simplifyyourlife #organizetheworld #fewerbetterthings #scandinavianhome #minimalistlifestyle
#konmari #mariekondo #konmarimethod #declutter #tidy

items.caption_text:
What’s behind my Narnia wardrobe? A wardrobe inside a wardrobe! ✨ Instead of having a walk-in closet to ourselves, I designed a wall-to-wall ceiling-to-floor build in wardrobe for myself and behind it it’s my husband’s wardrobe and home office ✨ This way there is zero visual noise and there is complete serenity in my bedroom ✨
.
.
.
.
.
________________

 #konmari #mariekondo #konmarimethod #declutter #tidy #declutteringmylife #seekingsimplicity #becomingminimalist #organizedmom #getorganized #declutterchallenge #lifechangingmagicoftidyingup  #konmariconsultants #organizedlife  #tidyhousetidymind #clutterfree #professionalorganizer #sparkjoy #mykonmari #choosejoy #simplifyyourlife #organizetheworld #fewerbetterthings #storageideas #storagesolutions #konmarifolding #closetgoals #minimalistlifestyle #softminimalism #minimalisthome

items.caption_text:
Just another busy day at home(work) ✨
As my home is also my workplace, it’s another reason for me to have a calm and tidy surroundings with no visual noise ✨In my previous home in Stockholm I had a lovely home office but here in Copenhagen I’m back working in my favorite spot - my dining room ✨ Do you have an home office or you prefer the kitchen area like I do?
.
.
.
.
.
___________________

items.caption_text:
🫧🫧 GIVEAWAy 🫧🫧

Since I moved to Copenhagen (only 6 months ago!) I discovers the lovely @humdakin - a responsible allergy-friendly and passionate approach about cleaning (and also so esthetic!). Now we joined together to offer you a voucher worth €200 for humdakin.com (or 1500 DKK for humdakin.dk). All you need to do in order to be eligible to be included in the poll is to make sure you follow @humdakin and tag a friend ✨
Winner will be chosen at random and will be announced on Feb 6th ✨✨
.
.
.
.
.
___________________
#humdakin #mariekondo #konmarimethod #declutter #tidy #declutteringmylife #softminimalism #organizedlife  #tidyhousetidymind #clutterfree #sparkjoy #mykonmari #choosejoy #simplifyyourlife #scandihome #fewerbetterthings #minimaliststyle #minimalbathroom #minimalistbathroom #minimalisthome #ecocleaning

items.caption_text:
Do you use your finest tableware only when you have guests? I use it everyday also when it’s only me and my family because joy should be on a daily basis and not only in special occasions. Agree? ✨
.
.
.
.
.
.
.

items.caption_text:
I searched for a sofa bed for my daughter’s new bedroom so she can have place for sleepovers and a corner to chill with her friends. And then I found the beautiful Danish @karup_design . In picture - me taking over this room in the mornings sometimes and turning it into my office 🙈✨
.
.
.
.
.

items.caption_text:
When we moved to this house only 3 months ago I couldn’t imagine living without a washing machine and dryer in my bathroom (like I had in Stockholm). Those machines are in the basement, meaning I have to go up and down the stairs wherever I need to do laundry. I even considered to invest money in this project to be able to have it in my bathroom. 3 months later I’m so happy to have all the laundry in the basement, meaning I keep my bathroom minimalist and tidy as possible ✨
.
.
.
.
.
_________________ 

#minimalistbathroom #konmari #mariekondo #konmarimethod #declutter #tidy #declutteringmylife #fewerbetter #cozybedroom #scandinavianhome  #konmariconsultants #organizedlife  #tidyhousetidymind #clutterfree #professionalorganizer #sparkjoy #mykonmari #choosejoy #simplifyyourlife #organizetheworld #fewerbetterthings

items.caption_text:
Just 3 months ago when we bought this house, my bedroom had blue walls and no wardrobe. Just today my Narnia wardrobe (with my husband’s hidden home office behind it) is finally ready. All the exterior is done by the lovely @a.s.helsingo which I discovered when I was living in Stockholm. Now it’s time to do what I love most - organize my wardrobe and my linen closet ✨
.
.
.
.
_______________
#ikeahack #ashelsingo #minimalisthome #minimalistwardrobe #konmari #mykonmari #profissionalorganizer #becomingminimalist #minimalistlifestyle #minimalistlife #minimalistliving #intentionalliving #conciousconsumer #instaquotesdaily #mindfulliving
